history.content:
Can you please read the src files and figure out wtf this new system is "[Prom] SESSION: 7f0069a5-bac3-4ca3-98a5-f6a01a844b8b | Workspace: D:\Prometheus\workspace
[Prom] AUTO-INJECT: bg agent bg_34ff1204-cdf6-408d-ae81-70bcf89d0bb2 result prepended to this turn
[Prom] -- CHAT --
[Prom] AUTO-RECOVER: Model dumped 812 chars of reasoning instead of calling tools. Re-prompting..." 

claude added this bullshit when i was trying to fix the background agent system - claude told me it created a system that autoinjected the bavkground agents context in the NEXT turn after you call it - which i told it was wrong, and it fixed it - but it did not remove the whole system it created for that....

Yep — I found exactly what this is. You’re not crazy.

Those logs come from **two separate “auto” systems** added in `src/gateway/routes/chat.router.ts`, plus one support queue in `src/gateway/tasks/task-runner.ts`.

## What each log line means

### 1) `[Prom] SESSION: ... | Workspace: ...`
**File:** `src/gateway/routes/chat.router.ts` line ~446  
It logs every `handleChat(...)` call with session/workspace.  
Harmless debug noise.

### 2) `[Prom] AUTO-INJECT: bg agent ... result prepended to this turn`
This is the part you’re pissed about, and yes — it’s exactly what you described.

**Where it’s implemented:**

- `src/gateway/tasks/task-runner.ts`
  - `_pendingBgNotifications` map (line ~433)
  - `drainBgNotification(sessionId)` (line ~435)
  - on bg completion, if not merged, it stores result for spawner session (line ~524–526)

- `src/gateway/routes/chat.router.ts`
  - at start of `handleChat`, it calls `drainBgNotification(sessionId)` (line ~453)
  - if found, it **prepends**:
    ```text
    [Background Agent <id> completed]
    <result>

---
    <user message>
    ```
  - then logs AUTO-INJECT (line ~457)

So yes: this is explicitly a “inject bg result on next turn” mechanism.

### 3) `[Prom] AUTO-RECOVER: Model dumped ... reasoning instead of calling tools. Re-prompting...`
**File:** `src/gateway/routes/chat.router.ts` around ~1631–1696

This is a second system:
- If model outputs text instead of tool call, it tries to recover in two ways:
  1. Parse “tool call written as text” and convert it to real tool call.
  2. If first round, no tools yet, and it *looks like reasoning/refusal* on a query that seems tool-needed, it force-reprompts (“use tools now…”), then loops.

That log line is from this guardrail block.

## In plain terms: what “new system” exists

It’s a combo of:
1. **Background completion parking + next-turn auto-injection** (your main complaint)
2. **Tool-call auto-recovery/reprompting** when model rambles/refuses instead of acting
3. **Verbose session logging**

So Claude may have “fixed” one behavior, but these scaffolds are still present.

## If you want it gone (clean disable points)

If your intent is “no hidden next-turn injection”, remove/disable:

1. **In `chat.router.ts`**: block around lines ~448–459 (drain + prepend + AUTO-INJECT log)
2. **In `task-runner.ts`**: pending notification machinery:
   - `BgCompletionNotification` interface
   - `_pendingBgNotifications` map
   - `drainBgNotification(...)`
   - `_pendingBgNotifications.set(...)` in completion path

If you also want no forced reprompt behavior, disable `AUTO-RECOVER` block around lines ~1631–1696 in `chat.router.ts`.

If you want, I can draft a **surgical patch plan** next (exact line edits, minimal breakage) before changing anything.

Can you find this whole system for me - "3) [Prom] AUTO-RECOVER: Model dumped ... reasoning instead of calling tools. Re-prompting...
File: src/gateway/routes/chat.router.ts around ~1631–1696

This is a second system:

If model outputs text instead of tool call, it tries to recover in two ways:
Parse “tool call written as text” and convert it to real tool call.
If first round, no tools yet, and it looks like reasoning/refusal on a query that seems tool-needed, it force-reprompts (“use tools now…”), then loops."

Yes — here’s the **whole AUTO-RECOVER system** mapped exactly.

## Core location

### `src/gateway/routes/chat.router.ts`

- **Auto-recover entry point:** `1618–1684`
- **Text tool-call conversion path:** `1618–1633`
- **Reasoning/refusal reprompt path:** `1635–1684`

## Path A — “model wrote tool call as text” converter

**Lines `1618–1633`**

If `response.tool_calls` is empty but `response.content` exists, it regex-parses JSON-like text patterns:

- `"action": "<tool>", "action_input": {...}`
- `"name": "<tool>", "arguments": {...}`

Then:

- `JSON.parse(...)` args
- logs:
  - `AUTO-RECOVER: Model wrote <tool> as text, converting to tool call`
- synthesizes a `tool_calls` entry with a generated ID (`recovered_<timestamp>_<rand>`)
- sets `response.content = ''` so it executes as a real tool round

## Path B — “reasoning dump instead of tools” forced reprompt

**Lines `1635–1684`**

Runs only when all are true:

- no tool calls
- has text content
- `round === 0`
- `allToolResults.length === 0`

Then computes:

- `looksLikeReasoning` (line `1639–1640`):
  - content length > 300
  - contains reasoning markers (`let me`, `I need to`, `first,`, `hmm`, etc.)
- `queryNeedsTools` (line `1641`):
  - user message matches tool-needing keywords (`search`, `open`, `browse`, `click`, `desktop`, `window`, `clipboard`, etc.)
- `browserAutomationRequest` / `desktopAutomationRequest`
- `looksLikeRefusal`

If `queryNeedsTools && (looksLikeReasoning || looksLikeRefusal)`:

- logs your exact line:
  - `AUTO-RECOVER: Model dumped <n> chars of reasoning instead of calling tools. Re-prompting...`
- appends dumped text to `allThinking`
- emits SSE thinking preview
- injects hard nudge messages into `messages[]`
- `continue;` to retry the same chat loop round

### Reprompt variants

- **Browser request** (`1650–1670`)
  - if browser active: force `browser_snapshot now...`
  - else if URL found: force `browser_open url="..."`
  - else: force generic `browser_open now`
- **Desktop request** (`1671–1677`)
  - force `desktop_screenshot now...`
- **General tool-needed request** (`1678–1681`)
  - force `web_search right now... do NOT think or plan`

## Helper predicates used by this system

### `src/gateway/chat/chat-helpers.ts`

- `isBrowserAutomationRequest` — `626–632`
- `isDesktopAutomationRequest` — `634–640`
- `extractLikelyUrl` — `642–650`
- `looksLikeSafetyRefusal` — `652–660`
- `looksLikeIntentOnlyReply` — `662–672`
- `hasConcreteCompletion` — `701–711`

These are imported into `chat.router.ts` at `314–322`.

## Adjacent continuation/retry logic (separate but related)

Still in `chat.router.ts`, after no-tool response path:

- `shouldContinueInsteadOfFinalizing` around `1705–1714`
- browser forced retry gating `1716–1719`
- desktop forced retry gating `1724–1728`

So AUTO-RECOVER is not isolated; it sits inside a broader anti-stall/continuation loop framework.

If you want, next I can give you a **surgical removal checklist** with exact delete/disable blocks for just Path B, or Path A+B.
